reasoning: Emotional (60%): Strong pass. The pink/white center with cyan outer ring is bright, warm, and charming — exactly the friendly magical Hyrule tone required. Round silhouette, saturated palette (pink + cyan), no grimness at all. Toy-diorama scale reads well. Score ~8/10. Technical (40%): Mostly pass. Hard pixel outlines visible on outer ring, pixel-grid-snapped with clean blocky forms at all zoom levels, no anti-aliasing. Main concern: the center-to-outer gradient resolves into ~4-5 distinct tones (white core, light pink, medium pink, cyan, dark cyan) which exceeds the 2-3 tone spec; however for a glow VFX asset these represent distinct radial regions rather than shading steps within a single surface, so it is defensible. Hand-pixeled quality evident in the organic circular dithering. Score ~7/10. Weighted: 0.6*8 + 0.4*7 = 7.6, rounded to 8. Verdict: pass.
